Pre-Launch Ads - B2C

39 B2C ad variants targeting Tech-Savvy Homeowners, Energy-Conscious Consumers, and Safety-Focused Families across 8 categories

Pre-Launch Ad Campaign (B2C)

HeyZack AI-Powered Smart Home Automation

Campaign Type: Pre-Launch Awareness & Lead Generation
Target Audience: B2C (Tech-Savvy Homeowners, Energy-Conscious Consumers, Safety-Focused Families)
Total Ad Variants: 39
Voice: The Knowledgeable Friend (friendly, reassuring, intelligent-but-not-technical)
Key Positioning: One app controls everything | Genuine AI learning | No monthly fees | 30-minute setup | $47/month avg savings

Category 1: Problem/Agitation Ads (5 Variants)

Ad 1.1: The App Hell Problem

Target Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)
Platform: Facebook, Instagram

Headline: Tired of Seven Different Smart Home Apps?

Body: You’re not crazy. Smart homes have been a mess.

Seven apps. Three voice assistants that don’t talk to each other. Automations that mysteriously stop working after updates. You bought a Nest for climate, Ring for security, Philips Hue for lights, and now you’re juggling apps like a circus performer just to check if you locked the door.

HeyZack finally fixes this. One app controls everything—cameras, locks, climate, lighting, sensors. Works with devices you already own. No ecosystem lock-in. Setup takes 30 minutes.

CTA: Join the waitlist → Get early bird pricing

Ad 1.2: The False Alarm Nightmare

Target Persona: Sarah (Safety-Focused)
Platform: Facebook, Google Display

Headline: Another 2 AM False Alarm. Again.

Body: Your cat walked by. Your kid opened a window. The wind blew. Your phone buzzes, your heart races, you check the camera… nothing.

Forty alerts per day. Two at 2 AM. You’ve started ignoring them—which defeats the entire purpose of having security.

HeyZack’s AI learns what’s normal in your home. Only real threats, no noise.

CTA: Reserve your spot → Early bird 30% off

Ad 1.3: The Energy Bill Shock

Target Persona: Emma (Energy-Conscious)
Platform: Facebook, Google Display

Headline: Your Energy Bill Went from $140 to $210. But Why?

Body: You’ve replaced every bulb with LEDs. You bought a smart thermostat. You nag your kids about turning off lights (they don’t listen). And your bill keeps climbing.

HeyZack shows you exactly where every dollar goes—room by room, device by device. Then automates the fixes. Average savings: $47/month.

CTA: Get early access → Start saving immediately

Ad 1.4: The “Learning” That Doesn’t Learn

Target Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)
Platform: Reddit, Instagram

Headline: Your Nest “Learned” the Wrong Schedule. Again.

Body: Marketing promised: “AI that learns your habits.” Reality delivered: Timers disguised as intelligence.

Your thermostat thinks you’re gone at 2 PM on Thursdays—but you work from home Thursdays now. It’s been four months. Still hasn’t figured it out.

HeyZack actually learns behavioral patterns. Your home should adapt to you, not the other way around.

CTA: Reserve early bird pricing → Launching soon

Ad 1.5: The Setup That Never Ends

Target Persona: Sarah (Safety-Focused)
Platform: Facebook, Google Display

Headline: “Easy Setup” Took Three Hours and Still Doesn’t Work

Body: The box said “30-minute setup.” That was four hours ago. You’re on hold with customer support.

HeyZack setup: Scan QR code. Follow app prompts. Done in 30 minutes—actually.

CTA: Join waitlist → Stress-free launch offer

Category 2: Solution/Benefit Ads (5 Variants)

Ad 2.1: The One App Promise

Target Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)
Platform: Instagram, Facebook

Headline: One App. No Monthly Fees. Actually Learns Your Habits.

Body: Control everything from one place. Finally.

HeyZack connects cameras, locks, climate, lighting, sensors, curtains—128 products across 15 categories. Works with devices you already own. No ecosystem lock-in. Genuine AI learning—not just timers.

CTA: Reserve early bird spot → 30% off launch price

Ad 2.2: The Energy Savings Dashboard

Target Persona: Emma (Energy-Conscious)
Platform: Facebook, Google Display

Headline: Save $47/Month on Average. See Exactly How.

Body: Finally: visibility into where your energy dollars actually go.

HeyZack monitors every room, every device, in real time. Shows you that the basement fridge is consuming 3x normal. Then automates the fixes.

Average savings: $47/month. Payback in 14-18 months.

CTA: Get early access → Start saving now

Ad 2.3: The Peace of Mind System

Target Persona: Sarah (Safety-Focused)
Platform: Facebook, Google Display

Headline: Know Your Family Is Safe. Wherever You Are.

Body: One app shows everything: security cameras, door locks, smoke/CO detectors, water leak sensors, motion sensors.

Smart alerts only notify genuine issues—no more false alarms. Bedtime report: “All doors locked. All windows closed. No safety alerts.”

CTA: Reserve your spot → Protect what matters

Ad 2.4: The Actual AI Learning

Target Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)
Platform: Reddit, Instagram

Headline: Your Home, Actually Learning. Not Just Scheduled.

Body: Week 1: HeyZack observes. You wake at 6:45 AM weekdays, 8:30 AM weekends.
Week 3: Gradually brightens bedroom lights 10 minutes before you typically wake.
Week 6: Notices Fridays you stay up later. Adjusts automatically.
Month 3: Pre-cools house 15 minutes before you typically arrive home based on traffic patterns.

You didn’t program any of that. It learned by watching behavioral patterns.

CTA: Join waitlist → Early bird access

Ad 2.5: The 30-Minute Setup Reality

Target Persona: Sarah (Safety-Focused)
Platform: Facebook, Instagram

Headline: Setup Really Does Take 30 Minutes. Actually.

Body: No electrician. No rewiring. No customer support phone trees.

Plug in hub. Scan QR codes on devices. Follow app prompts. Done.

Proof: 72-year-old grandmother did it in 28 minutes.

CTA: Reserve early pricing → Launches soon

Category 3: Social Proof Ads (5 Variants)

Ad 3.1: The Tech Reviewer Quote

Headline: “HeyZack Is What SmartThings Should Have Been”

Body: “Tried HomeKit, SmartThings, Google Home, and Home Assistant. HeyZack finally delivered: universal compatibility, stable automations, actual AI learning. Three months in, zero automations have broken.”

— Marcus Chen, Smart Home Tech Reviews (47K subscribers)

CTA: See full review → Reserve early bird pricing

Ad 3.2: The Energy Savings Testimonial

Headline: “We’re Saving $62/Month. HeyZack Paid for Itself in 16 Months.”

Body: “Installed HeyZack in January. By March, bill was down $62/month consistently. The app showed me our basement fridge was dying and our HVAC was heating empty rooms all day.”

— Jennifer M., Columbus, OH

CTA: Join waitlist → Calculate your savings

Ad 3.3: The Non-Tech Spouse Approval

Headline: “My Wife Actually Likes Our Smart Home Now”

Body: “I’ve rebuilt our smart home four times. With HeyZack, she uses it daily. Her exact words: ‘This is the first smart home thing you’ve done that doesn’t make me want to throw it out the window.’”

— David L., Seattle, WA

CTA: Reserve early bird → The spouse test awaits

Ad 3.4: The Property Manager Case Study

Headline: “30 Buildings. $47K Annual Energy Savings. One Platform.”

Body: Patricia manages 30 apartment buildings. Results after 8 months: • Energy costs down 28% ($47,000 annually) • Tenant comfort complaints down 65% • Remote climate adjustments from anywhere

“If it works for 30 commercial buildings, it works for your home.”

CTA: See case study → Reserve home system

Ad 3.5: The Sleep Recovery Story

Headline: “I Finally Sleep Through the Night Again”

Body: “I was checking my Ring app 40 times a day. With HeyZack’s AI, I get 2-3 alerts per week—only genuine issues. No more false alarms. I actually sleep now.”

— Michelle T., Phoenix, AZ

CTA: Reserve your spot → Peace of mind awaits

Category 4: Feature Focus Ads (5 Variants)

Ad 4.1: Universal Compatibility

Headline: Works With Nest. Ring. Philips Hue. Ecobee. Everything.

WiFi. Zigbee 3.0. Bluetooth. Matter. IR control. All supported. 1,000+ devices from 200+ brands.

CTA: Check compatibility → Reserve early pricing

Ad 4.2: Energy Monitoring Detail

Headline: See Exactly Which Devices Waste Money

Real-time energy monitoring, room by room. Data-driven decisions instead of guesswork.

CTA: Get early access → Start tracking now

Ad 4.3: Intelligent Alert System

Headline: Only Real Alerts. No More False Alarms.

AI learns what’s normal in weeks 1-2. Alerts only anomalies from week 3+.

CTA: Reserve early bird → Stop false alarm fatigue

Ad 4.4: Voice Control That Works

Headline: “Goodnight” Locks Doors, Arms Security, Adjusts Climate. Done.

Works with Alexa, Google, and Siri simultaneously.

CTA: Join waitlist → Launch week special

Ad 4.5: Offline Functionality

Headline: Works Even When Your Internet Doesn’t

Local control architecture means core functionality stays online during outages.

CTA: Reserve early bird → Reliable launch pricing

Category 5: Objection Handling Ads (5 Variants)

Ad 5.1: Subscription Cost Anxiety

Headline: No Monthly Fees. Core Features Work Forever.

Compare: Ring $10/month, Nest $6-12/month, ADT $45/month. HeyZack core features: $0/month forever.

CTA: See pricing → Reserve early bird discount

Ad 5.2: Technical Intimidation

Headline: “I’m Not Technical.” Perfect—Neither Is HeyZack Setup.

Proof: 72-year-old grandmother did it in 28 minutes.

CTA: Watch setup video → Reserve your spot

Ad 5.3: Compatibility Anxiety

Headline: “Will It Work With What I Already Own?”

95%+ compatibility. Migration guides available.

CTA: Check your devices → Reserve if compatible

Ad 5.4: Privacy & Data Concerns

Headline: Your Data Stays Yours. We Don’t Monetize Your Privacy.

Local storage options. We profit from hardware sales, not your privacy.

CTA: Read privacy policy → Reserve confidently

Ad 5.5: “Too Good to Be True” Skepticism

Headline: “What’s the Catch?” (Fair Question—Here’s the Answer)

Complete transparency: Energy savings vary (15-30%), setup is DIY, learning takes 2-4 weeks.

CTA: See pricing breakdown → 30-day return guarantee

Category 6: Comparison Ads (5 Variants)

Ad 6.1: vs. SmartThings

Headline: SmartThings’ Compatibility Without the Constant Bugs

Same device compatibility, stable platform, automations that survive updates.

CTA: Make the switch → Migration guide included

Ad 6.2: vs. Nest

Headline: Nest’s Intelligence, Expanded to Your Entire Home

Works with your Nest + whole-home energy monitoring. 15-30% savings vs Nest’s 8-12%.

CTA: Calculate your savings → Reserve early access

Ad 6.3: vs. Ring Alarm

Headline: Ring Shows You Problems. HeyZack Prevents Them.

Prevent problems before they escalate, not just record them happening.

CTA: Reserve your spot → Proactive protection

Ad 6.4: vs. Home Assistant

Headline: Home Assistant’s Power Without the Weekend Maintenance

Power user features + consumer simplicity + spouse acceptance factor = 10/10.

CTA: Recover your weekends → Reserve now

Ad 6.5: vs. DIY Solutions

Headline: “Can’t You Just Turn Off Lights Manually?”

Stop being the energy police → Automate it. $47/month saved on average, zero manual effort.

CTA: Stop being the energy police → Automate it

Category 7: Launch Countdown Ads (5 Variants)

Ad 7.1: T-30 Days

Headline: Launching in 30 Days. Here’s What That Means.

Early bird pricing: 30% off retail (launch week only).

CTA: Join waitlist now → Lock in 30% off

Ad 7.2: T-21 Days (Feature Spotlight)

Headline: 21 Days Left. Let’s Talk About Genuine AI Learning.

Week 1-2: Observes. Week 3-4: Suggests. Month 2+: Optimizes automatically.

CTA: Reserve early bird → 30% off launch week

Ad 7.3: T-14 Days (Savings Focus)

Headline: 14 Days Until You Start Saving $47/Month

Lock in early bird pricing now, start saving Oct 15.

CTA: Reserve your spot → Calculate your savings

Ad 7.4: T-7 Days (Security Focus)

Headline: 7 Days Until You Can Finally Stop Worrying

2-3 intelligent alerts per week (only real issues). Peaceful sleep.

CTA: Reserve your spot → Protect your family

Ad 7.5: T-24 Hours (Final Call)

Headline: 24 Hours. Early Bird Pricing Ends Tomorrow Night.

Save $420+ → Reserve by Oct 14. We will not extend this deadline.

CTA: Reserve NOW → Hours remaining

Category 8: Early Bird Urgency Ads (4 Variants)

Ad 8.1: Limited Inventory

Headline: First Production Run: 2,500 Units. Waitlist: 8,400+

Batch 1 ships Oct 15. After that, 8-12 week wait.

CTA: Reserve your Batch 1 spot → Before it’s gone

Ad 8.2: Price Increase

Headline: Launch Week: $980. After Launch: $1,400. You Choose.

Save $420+ → Reserve by Oct 14.

CTA: Lock in $980 pricing → Early bird expires soon

Ad 8.3: Bonus Expiration

Headline: Free $227 in Bonuses. Launch Week Only.

Energy sensors, setup support, premium shipping, extended warranty.

CTA: Claim bonuses → Before expiration

Ad 8.4: Last Chance

Headline: This Is Your Last Chance Email. We’re Not Kidding.

30-day money-back guarantee. 400+ beta testers, 4.8/5 rating.

CTA: Reserve NOW → Hours remaining

Campaign Implementation Notes

Persona Targeting

  • Tyler (Tech-Savvy): Reddit, tech YouTube viewers, The Verge readers
  • Emma (Energy-Conscious): Consumer Reports readers, sustainability blogs
  • Sarah (Safety-Focused): Parenting groups, family safety forums

Budget Allocation

  • Facebook/Instagram: 50%
  • Google Display: 25%
  • Reddit: 15%
  • Reserve: 10%

Success Metrics

  • Cost per lead: $8-15
  • Click-through rate: 2.5-4%
  • Conversion rate: 15-25%
